title: "log in as" option for Admins?
excerpt: Coming from ServiceNow and Moodle, as an Admin I am used to being able to “log in as” another User so I can see exactly what they see. Super helpful when analyzing problems. Often, problems are not really problems, just …

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Coming from ServiceNow and Moodle, as an Admin I am used to being able to “log in as” another User so I can see exactly what they see. Super helpful when analyzing problems. Often, problems are not really problems, just user error.

Has this option been discussed in Monday.com?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow Admins to Proxy as different Feature requests
We use Monday.com as a marketing agency. We use this to track not just the client work we do but also to keep track of all of our internal processes including more private information such as hiring progress and other HR related things. When we are setting up these workspaces, we are often asking other members of the team who we know are not admin to report back to us what things look like on their end to ensure the set up that we do is appropriate to the work. We would love to see a way for adm…

posts.author: BibiZavala (Bibi Zavala)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been thinking the same thing and no, there’s no way to change the view. I’ve been thinking of inviting myself using a personal email to check how things look

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now I’m using one of our licenses assigned to a Outlook shared account. I can then change it from Member to owner to viewer, etc. to see what happens. It works, but it seems to be a waste of $38 per month.

posts.author: TrueLinksupport (Janinne)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this would be very helpful.
